notes: Facts are source-derived from the public-domain scene file only.
No model output, NotebookLM output, retrieved reference, or generated story prose is included.

premise.logline: A prince seeks a real princess, and an old queen tests a storm-soaked visitor with a pea beneath many mattresses.

characters.name: prince
facts: He wants to marry a real princess.
He travels all over the world to find one.
He comes home sad after failing to find what he wants.
He takes the princess for his wife after the test.

characters.name: princess
facts: She arrives at the city gate during a terrible storm.
She says that she is a real princess.
She sleeps on a bed with a pea under twenty mattresses and twenty eider-down beds.
She reports sleeping badly and being black and blue from something hard in the bed.

characters.name: old queen
facts: She decides to find out whether the visitor is a real princess.
She places a pea on the bottom of the bedstead and piles bedding over it.

characters.name: old king
facts: He opens the city gate when knocking is heard during the storm.

settings.name: prince's home
facts: The prince returns there after travelling all over the world.

settings.name: city gate
facts: The princess appears there during thunder, lightning, and heavy rain.

settings.name: bedroom
facts: The old queen prepares the bedstead, pea, mattresses, and eider-down beds there.

settings.name: museum
facts: The pea is put there after the prince marries the princess.

objects.name: pea
facts: The old queen places it under twenty mattresses and twenty eider-down beds.
It becomes evidence used to identify the visitor as a real princess.
It is put in the museum.
